title: Saros Char System
description: Switch between multiple roleplay characters mid-game — each with their own inventory, position, health, and appearance.
body:
![https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Char_System/MP_Saros_Char_System_Header.webp](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Char_System/MP_Saros_Char_System_Header.webp)

![features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Char_System/MP_Saros_Char_System_Features.webp)

#### 🌟 **Character Management**
- **Character Creation**:
  - Use the `/createchar <first_name> <last_name> <birth_date> <gender>` command to create new characters.
  - Each character has unique attributes, including name, birth date, and gender.

- **Character Switching**:
  - Switch between characters with `/char <ID>`.
  - Inventory, effects, health, hunger, and position are saved and loaded automatically during character switches.
  - The current character is saved in a JSON file for seamless management.

#### 📂 **Data Management**
- Character data is stored server-side under `data/chars/<playerUUID>` as JSON files.
- Supports multiple characters per player (default: 2, configurable).
- Automatically saves and loads player states, including position, health, effects, and inventory.

#### ⚙️ **Configurable Options**
- Maximum number of characters per player (`maxChars`).
- Option to restrict commands to operators only (`requireOpForCommands`).

---

![commands](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Char_System/MP_Saros_Char_System_Commands.webp)
- **`/createchar`**  
  Creates a new character with personalized details:  
  `/createchar <first_name> <last_name> <birth_date> <gender>`  

- **`/char`**  
  Switch to a saved character:  
  `/char <ID>`  

- **`/charinfo`**  
  See Char Infos from Aktiv Char:  
  `/charinfo <playername>`  

---

![versions](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Char_System/MP_Saros_Char_System_SupportedVersions.webp)
- Forge 1.20.1✅

---

This mod brings a new level of role-playing depth to your Minecraft world! 🎮


 [![https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Char_System/MP_Saros_Char_System_PromoCard.webp "https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php ")](https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php "https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php")
